name: Chicken'n Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken pieces and pat them dry.
2. Lightly season with salt and pepper.
3. Combine all ingredients except chicken and rice in a Crock-Pot.
4. Stir well to ensure everything is mixed together.
5. Add chicken pieces, making sure each piece is coated evenly.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours.
Serves 4 to 6
